goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 20:15' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'birmingham new street'.
Make sure you get 'price', 'train ID', and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'concerthall'.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 20:15 and should leave on sunday
The train should depart from cambridge and should go to birmingham new street
Make sure you get price, train ID, and departure time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of concerthall
